question: what is suprathon
answer: SuPrathon 2.0 is India’s national-level virtual hackathon with multiple domains, global participation, mentorship, and exciting challenges.

question: When was SuPrathon 2025 held?
answer: The hackathon ran from July 18, 2025 (12:00 AM IST) to July 20, 2025 (12:00 PM IST). Registration closed on July 16, 2025, and results were announced on July 23, 2025.

question: How can I register for SuPrathon 2025?
answer: You could register by visiting the official website https://suprathon.suprazotech.in  and  filling the Google registration form and completing the UPI payment to confirm participation.

question: Is registration free?
answer: Yes , A nominal registration fee will be announced by the SuPrathon community prior to the hackathon.

question: Who can participate in SuPrathon 2025?
answer: SuPrathon mainly targets students, developers, and innovators interested in solving real-world problems through technology.Both individual and team participation are allowed, and solo participation is also permitted.

question: What domains are allowed in SuPrathon 2025?
answer: The hackathon includes multiple domains such as EdTech, FinTech, Agriculture, Healthcare, Defense, and more.

question: What were the submission requirements?
answer: Participants had to submit project title and domain, GitHub or Drive code link, demo video link, presentation deck (PDF/Slides), and a problem description before the deadline.

question: What were the judging criteria?
answer: Projects were evaluated based on Technical Complexity (25%), Real-World Impact (25%), Creativity (20%), Originality (15%), and Presentation Quality (15%).

question: Who were the judges?
answer: The judges are not disclosed publicly in advance. They will be announced by the Head of SuPrathon during the hackathon, based on the respective tracks.

question: Will I get a certificate for participating?
answer: Yes. All participants who completed their submission received a National Certificate of Participation and digital badges.

question: Will I get an internship?
answer: Internships were offered to top-performing teams and winners depending on partner company selections.

question: Is plagiarism allowed?
answer: No. Plagiarism or copying existing projects without proper attribution will lead to immediate disqualification.

question: Who can I contact for doubts or technical issues?
answer: You can contact the support team by following these steps: 1. Visit the official website  2. Go to the “Contact Us” section  3. Submit your query

question: Was SuPrathon 2026 fully online?
answer: Yes. SuPrathon 2026 would be conducted completely online with mentorship and communication handled virtually.

question: Who are you?
answer: I'm a SuPrathon chatbot designed to answer questions about SuPrathon events, rules, prizes, participation, and updates.

question: Who are the winners of SuPrathon 2K25?
answer: The official winners of SuPrathon 2K25 have been announced. However, detailed winner profiles are not publicly listed. For the latest updates, visit suprathon.suprazotech.in or follow SuPrathon’s official social media pages.
keywords: who are the winners of suprathon 2025

question: Who is Sumit Waghmare?
answer: Sumit Waghmare is the Founder of SuPrazo Technologies and the creator of the SuPrathon hackathon. He is a Full-Stack Developer, mentor, and speaker based in Nagpur, Maharashtra.Lets connect on LinkedIn at: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sumitwaghmaretech/

question: What is SuPrazo Technologies?
answer: SuPrazo Technologies is the IT company behind SuPrathon. It focuses on software development, digital transformation, internships, and supporting innovation among student developers.

question: Can participants register for multiple domains?
answer: No. Participants or teams can register for only one domain in a single SuPrathon edition.
keywords: can i register for multiple domains
can i register for multiple domains in one hackathon

question: Is a college ID or Bonafide certificate required?
answer: It is not required during registration, but organizers may request student verification later for prize distribution.

question: Can participants change their domain after registering?
answer: Generally no. Domain changes may only be possible before the hackathon begins if approved by the organizing team.
keywords: can i change my domain at last time

question: What are the team rules for SuPrathon 2025?
answer:
[1]. Team Size: 1-4 members, solo allowed
[2]. Team Composition: Can include members from other colleges, cities, or countries
[3]. Member Absence: Remaining members can submit; inform organizers
[4]. Teams should collaborate effectively and follow fair-play guidelines.
keywords: can i form a group with a different college member
how many members in a team
can i team up with friends from other colleges

question: Can beginners win SuPrathon?
answer: Yes. Beginners can win if they present innovative ideas with good technical implementation and clear demonstrations.

question: What type of project has the best chance of winning?
answer: Projects that solve real-world problems, demonstrate strong technical implementation, provide a working prototype, and have a clear presentation have the highest chance of winning.
keywords: which projects have a high chance to win

question: Is the registration fee worth it?
answer: Yes. The fee supports mentorship, event infrastructure, certificates, digital badges, prizes, and networking opportunities for participants.

question: What mentorship is available during the hackathon?
answer: During the hackathon (typically 36–48 hours), participants receive continuous support including:1.Guidance from industry mentors   2.Assistance from organizers   3.Access to community collaboration channels

question: Has SuPrathon received media coverage?
answer: Yes. SuPrathon has been featured on Devpost, Unstop, NoticeBard, LinkedIn, and other tech community platforms.For details:https://suprathon-2025.devpost.com/

question: What makes SuPrathon different from other hackathons?
answer: SuPrathon stands out due to its affordable fee, national certificates for all participants, mentorship, internship opportunities, and global virtual participation.

question: How many years has SuPrathon been conducted?
answer: SuPrathon is a growing hackathon initiative, and SuPrathon 2K25 represents one of its major national editions.

question: Did previous winners receive internships or job opportunities?
answer: Yes. Previous winners received internship opportunities, job referrals, premium courses, tech goodies, and cash prizes as part of the reward package.

did they got their job opportunities

question: What are the prizes for SuPrathon 2025?
answer: 1st Place: Cash prize, trophy, internships, national certificate, tech goodies. 2nd Place: Tech goodies, internships, premium courses, certificate. 3rd Place: Free courses, learning resources, certificate. Most Innovative Idea: Surprise gifts and innovation badge. All participants receive certificates and digital badges.
